title: Foi1ys Lantern Corps
body:
![Apex Hosting ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b3175ad0db007121af640ac305b706d0c6ea12f.png)
[https://apexhost.gg/Foi1y](https://apexhost.gg/Foi1y)

![Foi1ys Lantern Corps Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bb349aada44614f55d5863ca0163f4d0fca470d.png)

I have returned to my original Lanterns full on remaking them from the ground up! This time ditching the old Item Constructs and going for a whole new system. Each Lantern will be unique within their Constructs and Abilities and will be focused more towards Canon aspects. I plan to focus on Quality now instead of Quantity making sure everything I do is my best work so I can provide a fun yet challenging experience while adding in my favourite Character/power concept.

Constructs are going to be balanced and creative no more just doing pickaxes and swords it's time for some new fun stuff to show off the creativity and whimsy of a Lantern as they can make anything they can imagine.

![Constructs Image Green Lantern](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bbb75db3cb098914dbd6fddd40b01a64cfb08976.png)

[Curseforge Alternative](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/foi1ys-lantern-corps)

Either Curios or Trinkets is Required to play the Addon. V3.0 and Higher no longer require Fsang18's Heropack

Join the Discord - [Foi1ys Lantern Corps Discord](https://discord.gg/QfPWaB7bFV)
